auctionSwiper.subtitle: Register now and secure your spot before bidding opens.

statsSection.description: Real numbers from a platform built on transparency, trust, and results.

howitwork.description: Four simple steps to start winning premium auctions across Egypt.

steps.subtitle: Register in Minutes
steps.title: Create Your Account
steps.description: Sign up with your email or phone number. Verify your identity securely and unlock access to Egypt's most exclusive online auction marketplace.

steps.subtitle: Discover Premium Lots
steps.title: Browse Live Auctions
steps.description: Explore curated auctions across electronics, beauty, wearables, and more. Filter by category, budget, or time remaining to find your perfect item.

steps.subtitle: Secure & Transparent
steps.title: Place Your Bid
steps.description: Register for the auction, apply a promo code if you have one, and place your bid. Real-time updates keep you in the loop every second.

steps.subtitle: Fast Nationwide Delivery
steps.title: Win & Receive
steps.description: If your bid wins, we handle the rest. Secure payment processing and verified delivery straight to your door — anywhere in Egypt.

auctionsSection.subtitleUpcoming: Discover exclusive upcoming auctions and register before seats run out.
auctionsSection.subtitlePast: Browse our completed auctions and meet the winning bidders.
auctionsSection.name: Name

auctionRequest.subtitle: Tell us what item you'd like to bid on. We'll match it with an upcoming auction or create one just for you.
auctionRequest.loginTitle: Sign in to submit a request
auctionRequest.loginSubtitle: Create an account or log in to request your dream auction item.

auctionRequest.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

success.title: Request Submitted!
success.description: Our team will review your request and notify you when a matching auction becomes available.

footer.tagline: Egypt's most exclusive online auction platform — where every bid is a chance to win premium products at unbeatable prices.

newsletter.description: Get notified about upcoming auctions, exclusive deals and promo codes.
newsletter.disclaimer: No spam. Auction alerts only. Unsubscribe anytime.
